title: The Wind Is Strong, and the Cats Are in a Frenzy
overview: On a bright night illuminated by the full moon, Akira steps into her apartment's elevator and encounters a man who's dressed bizarrely and tells her many strange things then disappears. Once the elevator doors open, she finds herself in another world.

title: Those Who Defy the Cruel Moon
overview: The Maledictor from the East, Faust, had protected one of his comrades in the last battle against the Great Calamity and was gravely injured. Akira visits him after being told she might be able to save him. She then meets various wizards from the Northern Country and the most powerful wizard, Oz.

title: A Heartfelt Breakfast
overview: It's decided that a ritual to summon new wizards will be performed. The only one who can perform this ritual is the Sage, Akira. While preparations were being done for the ritual, Akira was reading notes about the wizards in the Sage's Tome to get closer to them.

title: The Unknown, Fear, and Mutual Prosperity
overview: Akira and the wizards meet the new wizards that Akira successfully summoned.

title: A Mixer With Some Free-Willed Wizards
overview: Akira and the wizards hold a mixer and then, Akira, Cain, Riquet, and Arthur head north to see Oz.

title: Something Someone as Innocent as You Can Do
overview: Akira and the wizards get ready to head to their parade in the Central Country.

title: Uninvited Guests at the Party
overview: The wizards and Akira enjoy themselves at the party held for them but then some uninvited guests show up.

title: The Fragments of the Distorted Miracle
overview: Akira and a few of her wizards go investigate a graveyard.

title: A Melancholic Dance on Thin Ice
overview: Owen is suspected of trying to murder Nicholas and Chloe gives a scarf to a friend.

title: I Can Keep Walking Even If I'm All Alone
overview: Akira and the wizards head back to the Wizards' Hall after the incident with Owen in the Central Country.

title: The Bird of Omen Awakens
overview: There seems to be something peculiar about Owen and Snow and White remember the truth about the Umbra Volans.

title: May Your World Be Blessed
overview: Akira and the wizards face off with Nova.
